spec_match.rationale: Clearly presents standard layout options matching different book/tent fold configurations enabled by the API.

interactive.rationale: Interactive posture simulator buttons allow viewing the responsive UI frame changes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fits the conceptual description of posture-aware adaptation.

edge_cases.rationale: Checks real API and gives helpful message if single-screen browser is used.

references.rationale: Has links to related viewport concepts in index.

design_system.rationale: Follows CSS guidelines and uses custom variables properly.

summary: An excellent posture-aware layout simulation demonstrating how viewports split side-by-side or top-to-bottom.
